title: Vivi Searches for the Shooter
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on vivi searches for the shooter, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Vivi Searches for the Shooter. The bomb’s location and countdown push the Alubarna battle into its final desperate stage. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: By the way, you shouldn't mistakenly think of me as a swordsman...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I've got plenty of other weapons to cut your body to shreds!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: So you aren't a swordsman, are you...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Then what exactly are you, a miner!?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: S-Sparks!? How fast are those things spinning!?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: My swords are getting bumped back!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I wouldn't even make for a good miner,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Since I'd cut through everything without restraint.

summary: This part develops vivi searches for the shooter and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
